shortAnswer: GOT/AST (aspartate aminotransferase) is an enzyme found in the liver, heart, and muscles. Elevated levels can indicate liver damage or heart problems. In combination with GPT/ALT, it helps narrow down the cause. Discuss abnormal values with your doctor.
metaDescription: GOT / AST elevated? Normal ranges, causes, and meaning of this liver enzyme: explained simply.
doctorQuestions: Does the GOT/GPT ratio point to a specific cause?
When should the value be rechecked?
pageTitle: GOT/AST value: Aspartate Aminotransferase explained | Medyra
